question: Which utensil is used to spread the sauce on the dough in the segments showing the person wearing a white apron? A. Metal ladle B. Wooden ladle C. Pizza cutter D. Rolling pin
How many words make up the large text title displayed above the rectangular tomato pie?

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a maroon shirt uses a pizza cutter to slice a rectangular deep-dish pizza featuring a thick golden crust. An individual in a white apron spreads thick red tomato sauce over pale dough using a ladle. The dough rests on a wooden countertop. A woman with long dark hair holds a slice topped with sauce and cheese, taking a bite while supporting it with a white paper plate.

Describe the sequence of preparation steps shown for the pizza, including specific actions and timestamps.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a metal ladle pours thick red sauce onto a white dough base; at 6s, a person in a white apron spreads the sauce using a wooden ladle; at 10s, coarse white salt crystals are sprinkled over the red sauce layer; at 12s, finished rectangular slices with cheese are revealed in a pan; at 16s, a woman takes a bite of a slice.

canonical_answer: The sauce is spread as a thick layer on a slice of white bread.
